'''Privitt''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stationed at a [[Imperial Relay Outpost V-798|communications outpost]] on the planet [[Vaal/Legends|Vaal]].

==Biography==
Having been stationed only a few weeks before the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], Privitt was confused by the relaxed attitude of the two other officers there. Still reluctant, he finally embraced their views. After [[Battle of Yavin]], he witnessed [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was looking for a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to take him off the planet, coming to the outpost.

{{Char-stub}}
